hero.title: CEO Summary
hero.description: Your strategic, exception-based lens across VOIS — integrating Top-line growth, Customer performance, Cost & OFCF, People & talent, Transformation and FY27 goal alignment into a single board-ready view. AI-generated commentary distils each pillar into one executive narrative for Connect, Board and 1:1 conversations.

mmdNarrative.leadNarrative: Customer ready to expand on cloud platform — looking for a roadmap from VOIS on AI ops by Q3. Two execs flagged sponsorship of upcoming summit.

goals.text: Grow Revenue to €2.85B with disciplined margin
Deliver Horizon-2 transformation milestones on plan
Restore EBITDA to plan within FY27

aiSummary.title: Executive Summary
aiSummary.overall: Overall VOIS performance is resilient with two clear pressure points. Revenue and OFCF are ahead of FY27 plan, customer sentiment is strong, and people engagement remains healthy. Cost takeout is overshooting and EBITDA is materially below plan, both driven by Operations.

takeaways.text: Top-line: Revenue €2,858M (+1.53% vs target); 7 new badges / Gen-2 deals booked in Mar-26.
Customer & People: NPS 89 (Passives), Spirit Beat 85 — strongest indicators of engagement health.
Transformation: 3 of 4 Horizon-2 programmes green; CSM re-platform slipped 4 weeks.

watchpoints.text: EBITDA: −€36.33M vs €0 target — driven by cost overshoot of 38.8%.
Gen-2 lifecycle: Salesforce categorisation incomplete; reconciliation with Finance "second-gen deals" in flight.
Talent: Critical-role coverage at 78% (target 85%) — HR refresh of FY27 KPI in progress.

actions: Review cost overshoot with COO in next 1:1 — drill set to Operations tower.
Confirm Gen-2 tagging owner with CCO; align Commercial & Finance definitions.
Approve refreshed Talent KPI set with CHRO before Board pack lock.

1.title: REQ 01 — Top-Line Performance
feedback: Page already exists on the VOIS 360 scorecard.
Ed confirmed team is working with business owners to refresh KPIs against FY27 goals.
Action: Align on exact KPIs to show for the CEO persona view.
1.description: Persona-aligned CEO landing page showing the agreed 5–10 critical KPIs refreshed to FY27 goals.
dependencies: Business owner sign-off on the FY27 KPI set.
Finance and HR teams to complete the annual KPI refresh.
1.acceptanceCriteria: CEO opens the Hub and sees one page with the 5–10 agreed KPIs against FY27 targets, with RAG status visible.
1.userStory: As the CEO, I want a single persona-aligned landing page showing the 5–10 agreed critical KPIs against FY27 targets with RAG status, so that I can assess top-line organisational health at a glance.

2.title: REQ 02 — Board-Ready Narrative
feedback: No clear, concise narrative tied to strategy in one view today.
AI-generated commentary per pillar merged into a single executive summary.
Narrative work is best matured at the end once data sources are stable.
2.description: AI-generated commentary per strategic pillar merged via LLM into one executive summary for the whole VOIS Hub.
dependencies: Internal AI / LLM teams (commentary models in progress).
Data sources mature enough across all pillars.
acceptanceCriteria: Each pillar page shows dynamic LLM-generated commentary.
A single board-paper-style executive summary can be generated on demand.
Commentary updates when underlying data changes.
2.userStory: As the CEO, I want AI-generated commentary per strategic pillar merged into one executive summary distributable as a monthly PDF/email, so that I have a clear, board-ready narrative tied to strategy.

3.title: REQ 03 — ★ Topline Growth & New Badges
feedback: New logos / new badges NOT currently captured — not standardised in Salesforce.
Finance tracks this as 'Gen 2 deals'.
End-to-end pipeline lifecycle not well closed today.
Exception-based / minimalist reporting (top deals, big problems).
3.description: Exception-focused CEO view of top-line growth that surfaces the biggest wins and biggest problems.
dependencies: Salesforce categorisation of new logos / Gen 2 deals.
Alignment between Finance 'second-gen deals' and Commercial pipeline tagging.
Closure of the pipeline → win → loss lifecycle data.
acceptanceCriteria: CEO view shows new-logo / Gen 2 deal count and value separately.
Clicking through opens the detailed pipeline dashboard.
3.userStory: As the CEO, I want an exception-focused view surfacing top deals, new logos / Gen 2 deals and the biggest pipeline problems, so that I can track commercialisation progress.

4.title: REQ 04 — Customer Performance
feedback: Data is mostly there but narrative is missing.
MMD (customer engagement) work is starting to add user-led inputs.
Gaps: external customer spend trends; share-of-wallet report is annual and limited.
4.description: Consolidated customer-lens view combining internal performance data with user-led inputs and external spend / share-of-wallet view.
dependencies: MMD dataset and engagement-lead input process.
4.acceptanceCriteria: For a selected customer, the page shows internal performance, engagement narrative from SMEs, and available external spend context on one screen.
4.userStory: As the CEO, I want a consolidated customer-lens view combining internal performance data, engagement-lead narrative and external spend / share-of-wallet context.

5.title: REQ 05 — Stakeholder Engagement Data
feedback: Different slices of the same underlying data.
Quarterly Key Performance Levers update process can be reused.
Park as extension scope for after the persona views are in place.
5.description: Filtered slices of the persona dashboards for board members, key customers, suppliers and direct-report 1:1s.
dependencies: Persona dashboards (items 1–9) need to be in place first.
5.acceptanceCriteria: Once persona views exist, a user can apply a filter or export and receive a slice fit for that audience.
5.userStory: As the CEO, I want filtered slices of the persona dashboards tailored for board members, key customers, suppliers and direct-report 1:1s.

6.title: REQ 06 — Transformation Tracking
feedback: No dedicated transformation page on the Hub today.
Leverage Horizon 2 reporting covering VOE, CSM, service-data transformations.
Ed agreed: 'something is better than nothing'.
6.description: A dedicated transformation view on the Hub fed from Horizon 2 reporting.
dependencies: Existing transformation dashboards to be integrated into the VOIS Hub.
Horizon 2 programme governance and data feed.
6.acceptanceCriteria: CEO can see a list of in-flight transformation initiatives with RAG status, milestone progress and value delivered.
6.userStory: As the CEO, I want a dedicated transformation page fed from Horizon 2 reporting showing in-flight initiatives, so that I can track speed and quality.

7.title: REQ 07 — FY27 Goals Alignment
feedback: Offline cross-check already done — majority of goal data points are captured.
Dedicated view listing annual goals with direct pointers could be built simply.
7.description: An explicit FY27 goals page that lists annual organisational goals with direct pointers to supporting data points.
dependencies: Confirmation of any goals not yet covered.
acceptanceCriteria: FY27 goals page lists every annual goal.
Each goal has a direct pointer to the supporting Hub data point.
7.userStory: As the CEO, I want an explicit FY27 goals page listing every annual organisational goal with direct pointers to the supporting data points.

8.title: REQ 08 — Confidence in GMT Grip
feedback: Broader theme of drill-through from a CEO view into deeper data.
Dashboard becomes the drill-through Gary uses when an exception flag fires.
Existing dashboards retain value as the depth layer.
8.description: Drill-through from the CEO exception view into the underlying detailed dashboards.
dependencies: Persona-driven CEO dashboard must sit above the existing detailed views.
8.acceptanceCriteria: From any RAG flag or KPI on the CEO view, Gary can click through to the underlying detailed page owned by the relevant GMT member.
8.userStory: As the CEO, I want to click through from any RAG flag or KPI on my persona view into the underlying detailed dashboard, so that I can verify grip on detail.
